data.heading: Complimentary
data.content: With our German design and engineering roots, we contribute complimentary engineering services to every project — from conceptual integration of structural and material sciences, to manufacturing engineering and packaging.
data.imageAlt: Sunlite Signs engineering team designing channel letters

data.heading: Trusted by Trade Partners Who Need Reliability

items.question: Jake Morrison, Operations Manager — SignCraft Pro, Denver CO
items.answer: We switched to Sunlite for our channel letter projects last year and haven't looked back. The engineering support alone saves us hours per job, and the 3-week turnaround is consistent. They genuinely operate as a silent partner — our clients never know.

items.question: Maria Chen, Owner — Pacific Sign Works, Vancouver BC
items.answer: What sold us was the no-channel-conflict promise. As a smaller shop, we were tired of manufacturers undercutting us. Sunlite only sells wholesale, period. The quality of their trimless letters is the best we've seen at this price point.

items.question: David Kowalski, Production Lead — Great Lakes Signage, Detroit MI
items.answer: The quote turnaround is real — we usually get pricing back same day. Their packaging is excellent too, we've had zero damage across dozens of shipments. It's refreshing to work with a manufacturer that actually understands what installers need.

items.question: Sarah Bennett, VP Sales — Southern Sign Alliance, Atlanta GA
items.answer: Sunlite has become our go-to for anything illuminated. The German engineering shows in the fit and finish. Our franchise clients notice the quality difference, and that makes us look good. The complimentary engineering drawings save us real money.

steps.title: Submit Artwork
steps.description: Send us your artwork, drawings, or project specs. We accept all standard file formats.

steps.title: Review & Engineering
steps.description: Our team reviews your submission and provides complimentary engineering support.

steps.title: Quote Approval
steps.description: Receive a detailed wholesale quote within 24 hours. Approve to begin fabrication.

steps.title: Fabrication & QC
steps.description: Precision manufacturing with multi-point quality control at every stage.

steps.title: Secure Packaging
steps.description: Custom crating and packaging engineered to protect your signs in transit.

steps.title: Delivery
steps.description: Door-to-door shipping to your installer or job site across the USA and Canada.

data.heading: Custom European Signage,
data.content:
The foundation of Sunlite Signs begins with a partnership rooted in German precision engineering — and a commitment to never compete with our customers.

From LKF Lichtwerbung in Nuremberg to Florida, we bring decades of European signage expertise exclusively to the trade.
data.imageAlt: Sunlite Signs team and LKF Lichtwerbung partnership
